name: Turkey Sweet and Sour Meatballs
recipeIngredient: 1/2 red bell pepper, seeded and minced
1/2 green bell pepper, seeded and minced
recipeInstructions:
MEATBALLS:
1 medium red new potato -- peeled and chopped into 1-inch chunks
1 small onion -- cut into 1-inch chunks
2 large egg whites
1 teaspoon Italian seasoning
1 clove garlic
1 teaspoon salt
1/2 teaspoon black pepper
2 1/2 pounds lean ground turkey
SAUCE:
Combine all ingredients in a 4-quart saucepan.
Simmer over medium-low heat for 30 minutes.
MEATBALLS:
In a food processor or blender, puree potato, onions, egg whites, Italian seasoning, garlic, salt, and pepper until smooth.
Transfer to a large bowl. Add turkey and mix thoroughly.
Shape the mixture into 1-inch balls.
Add meatballs to the sauce.
Shake the pan to coat the meatballs with the sauce.
Partially cover and simmer on low heat for 30 minutes (refrain from stirring during the first 30 minutes or until the meatballs are firm).
Remove the cover and simmer for another 30 minutes until the sauce thickens. Shake the pot several times during cooking to avoid sticking.
Note: This recipe freezes well.
